good: Which speech did the artist claim that they rejected?
bad: Which speech did the artist resign before they rejected?
note: Extraction from a 'that' complement is fine; extraction from an adjunct clause is barred (adjunct island).

good: Which contract did the artist admit that they revised?
bad: Which contract did the artist celebrate because they revised?
note: Extraction from a 'that' complement is fine; extraction from an adjunct clause is barred (adjunct island).

good: Which article did the lawyer argue that the committee finalized?
bad: Which article did the lawyer resign after the committee finalized?
note: Extraction from a 'that' complement is fine; extraction from an adjunct clause is barred (adjunct island).

bad: Which report did the senator cry while the team edited?

bad: Which contract did the artist cry when the committee signed?
note: Extraction from a 'that' complement is fine; extraction from an adjunct clause is barred (adjunct island).
